steps.title: Find the two clauses
steps.content: The sentence has two independent clauses: synthetic fibers are more durable than natural plant fibers, and manufacturing synthetic fibers requires toxic solvents. The clauses also contrast benefit with drawback.

steps.title: Join with comma and but
steps.content: A uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. B uses 'but' without the conventional comma. C fuses the clauses with no punctuation or conjunction. The comma plus coordinating conjunction is needed. The answer is D.
